overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The scene transitions from a covered urban corridor under an overpass to open downtown streets with towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and neon-lit architecture. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with wet reflective streets, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: futuristic blue sports car passes by on the left side of the road
exiting the covered overpass area into open street with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk, maintaining distance from ego

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead with metal support beams
illuminated yellow warning signs with red text mounted on the right wall
tall metal security fencing running along the left side of the walkway
tall industrial street lamps with orange-yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a semi-covered urban corridor. Yellow neon danger signs illuminate the right wall while metal fencing lines the left. The character walks forward on the concrete sidewalk, following a distant pedestrian, as a futuristic blue vehicle passes on the road. The atmosphere is artificially lit and sheltered from weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: transition from artificial tunnel lighting to mixed neon and ambient city light
slight camera turn to the left to follow the pedestrian around the billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk toward the massive X-shaped skyscraper, passing holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with distinctive X-shaped structural pattern on facade, dominating the skyline
large rotating holographic advertisement displaying 'WET DREAM' with colorful abstract graphics
rows of warm yellow neon strip lights lining the building facade on the right

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a wide downtown street with the iconic X-shaped Arasaka Tower dominating the skyline ahead. A large holographic 'WET DREAM' billboard rotates on the left while warm neon lights line the right building facade. The lighting shifts from artificial tunnel glow to mixed neon city illumination as futuristic vehicles pass on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and traffic barriers

events.description: approaching intersection with illuminated traffic arrow markings on the road
stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk, following the pedestrian while navigating around other people

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego toward the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner including a person in yellow plaid shirt

entered.detail: massive building with distinctive arch-shaped cutout in the center, illuminated against the night sky
green street sign with white text reading 'Santo' mounted on a pole
illuminated chevron arrow markings on the road surface directing traffic flow

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the holographic billboard toward a major intersection. The X-shaped skyscraper shifts to the left as a massive arch-shaped building comes into view ahead. Street signs and illuminated traffic arrows mark the crosswalk area. The pedestrian density increases as the character approaches the corner and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with multiple traffic lanes and elevated highways

events.description: futuristic boxy truck drives past from right to left across the intersection
camera pans left to observe the elevated highway ramps and surrounding traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the surrounding traffic and cityscape, occasionally glancing at passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow utility truck driving through the intersection with headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete highway structure with support pillars curving through the cityscape
low-rise industrial structures with illuminated windows beneath the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character navigating across the busy intersection with dense futuristic traffic including trucks and sedans. The camera pans to reveal elevated highway ramps and industrial buildings on the left while the arch-shaped building moves to the right. The scene captures the bustling cyberpunk atmosphere with multiple vehicles, street lighting, and complex urban infrastructure before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor under a highway overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where yellow neon danger signs and metal fencing line a sheltered sidewalk as a blue vehicle passes by. As the camera exits the overpass, the scene opens into a wide street dominated by the X-shaped Arasaka Tower and a rotating holographic billboard, shifting the lighting from a tunnel glow to a vibrant mix of city neon. The movement continues past the hologram toward a major intersection, where the skyline shifts to reveal a massive arch-shaped building and increasing pedestrian density at the crosswalk. Finally, the camera navigates across the busy intersection amidst dense futuristic traffic, panning to reveal elevated highway ramps and industrial infrastructure that complete the bustling cyberpunk landscape.
